## Checklist

- [ ] Tests written first (London School TDD — acceptance test before implementation)
- [ ] `npm run test` passes with no regressions
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] ADR updated if architectural decision made
- [ ] Content reviewed against ANS-C01 domain objectives
